title: Super Transport series
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Super Transport series''' was a series of large container ships produced by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]].

Ships in the Super Transport series were boxy, slow, and carried no weapons or shields. They made up for their shortcomings with their exceptional cargo capacity, but required escorts for protection against [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]].

==Ships in the Super Transport series==

*[[Super Transport VII]]
*[[Super Transport XI]]
